text.title: Laravel Decomposition Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — DTOs lock shapes; discovery suffers
skip-this-methodology — Action/DTO ceremony exceeds readability gain
upgrade PHP first; readonly promotion is load-bearing for the DTO pattern

branch.question: Codebase already uses a consistent pattern (Service-class)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — mixing styles is worse than one consistent style; extend existing convention
extract verbs into Actions; thin controller to FormRequest + DTO + Action + Resource
apply remaining rules — explicit Resource fields + namespace whitelist + action-returns-result

text.example: shape=long_lived_api → php_version=8.2 → existing_pattern=none_or_fat_controller → fat_controller=true → controllers-only-call-actions → extract Actions per verb.
